column1: Man is a Gregarious animal and everything he does has an effect upon his fellows.
Personal hygiene is within the scope of an individual.
Cleanliness is not a social responsibility
The emotions of love, gratitude, faith, hope, joy and pleasure are depressing.
An indivisual should not only endeavour to protect his own health and health of the members of his family but als try to improve upon the health of his neighbours
The health of the individual and community are not dependednt upon each other
